response.overview: # Translation  The struggle of a former dancer, Syah, whose activities have halted due to a slipped disc condition, transforms as he becomes a teacher to a group of secondary school students from a remote area far from urban conveniences, facing lives that are not only impoverished and lacking in resources, but also confronted with successive problems. With a spirit of teamwork, they won a competition at the national level and subsequently represented the country, winning several medals at the international level in the "World Cup Dance". Syah faced numerous obstacles before reaching this stage. Syah has been honored by numerous countries as a choreographer and best cultural dance instructor, while elevating the name of Malaysia to the world stage through cultural arts.
response.title: Tari Sama Bayu
